headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Ventas, Lowers Price Target to $88
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Ventas (NYSE:VTR) with a Sector Perform and lowers the price target from $95 to $88.

headline: REITs: Cheap, Unloved, And Finally Showing Life
summary: REITs in 2026 are defying rising yields as fundamentals, M&A, NOI growth, and dividend hikes drive returns.
